---
title: "Outside Research"
---

## Books

Some books I've recently enjoyed:

| Title | Author |
|-------|--------|
| *The Lever of Riches* | Joel Mokyr |
| *Weapons of Math Destruction* | Cathy O'Neil |
| *Micromotives and Macrobehavior* | Thomas C. Schelling |
| *The Highest Exam: How the Gaokao Shapes China* | Ruixue Jia |
| *Steppenwolf* | Hermann Hesse |
| *The Stranger* | Albert Camus |

## Watching

Some things I've recently enjoyed:

| Title |
|-------|
| *The Social Dilemma* |
| *Painkiller* |
| *The Good Doctor* |
| *The Pitt* |
| *Friends* |
| *How I Met Your Mother* |
| *Young Sheldon* |
